Letra_cifra:

        Dm7              Cmaj7      C   (2x)
         / / / /  / / / /  / / / /  / / / /

Verse 1:
              Dm7            Cmaj7      C
        These eyes cry every night for you
              Dm7          Cmaj7      C    
        These arms long to hold you again
 C/B


[ Chorus ]
        Am              C
        The hurtin's on me
        Am              C
        I will never be free
        Am                    C
        You gave a promise to me
                 G
        And you broke it

{repeat intro, 1X}

Verse 2:

        These eyes watched you bring my 
world to an end
        This heart could not accept and 
pretend

[ Chorus ]
        The hurtin's on me
        I will never be free
        You took a vow with me
        When you spoke it

        Fmaj7/G  Cmaj7
                       These eyes
        Fmaj7/G  Cmaj7
                       are cryin'

 Cmaj7               D
 one like I had with you
